steps.title: Find the consequential action
steps.content: UNESCO is “championing its preservation and protection.” This is the stated consequence of their evaluation of the site's value. The blank must be filled with a word describing the kind of assessment that logically leads to championing.

steps.title: Match the assessment to the choices
steps.content: ”Recognized” means to identify or acknowledge as valuable—exactly the type of assessment that would lead to championing and protection. Exploited, impeded, and neglected all describe actions contrary to preservation, contradicting what UNESCO is actually doing. That matches choice B — B is correct.
